# MT Eval Arena

> Open, reproducible machine translation benchmarks for low-resource languages.

**💰 Active Prize: $10,000 CAD** — The Founder's Prize for the first method that achieves genuinely capable English → Plains Cree translation. Composite ≥ 0.80, FST acceptance ≥ 99%, chrF++ ≥ 55, community validation by bilingual speakers. Evaluated against secret test corpora (anti-gaming by design). No expiry. See [Prize Specification](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/specifications/prizes) for full thresholds and claim process.

## Getting Started

- [The MT Eval Arena](https://mtevalarena.org/docs): Project overview, benchmarks, and how to get started.
- [How It Works](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/how-it-works): Full platform architecture: competitive crowdsourcing with sovereign evaluation.
- [Agent Guide: Winning the Arena](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/getting-started/agent-guide): How AI agents can build translation methods, benchmark them, and submit to the leaderboard.
- [Submit a Method](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/getting-started/submit-a-method): Step-by-step guide to submitting your first benchmark run to the leaderboard.
- [Contributing Compute](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/getting-started/contributing-compute): Donate your tokens: run open benchmark sweeps from the public queue.
- [Deploy to Production](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/getting-started/deploy-to-production): Take a proven method from the Arena and deploy it via champollion.
- [FAQ](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/getting-started/faq): Frequently asked questions about the MT Eval Arena.

## Specifications

- [Benchmark Specification](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/specifications/benchmark): Canonical evaluation protocol, corpus format, and run card schema.
- [Scoring Specification](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/specifications/scoring): Metrics, composite weights, quality tiers, and cost/speed formulas.
- [Eval Harness v2.0](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/specifications/harness): Installation, configuration, and usage of the MT evaluation harness.
- [Method Interface](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/specifications/methods): The TranslationMethod protocol, method cards, and dependency classes.
- [Run Card Specification](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/specifications/run-card): Full JSON schema for evaluation run cards.
- [Statistical Significance Testing](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/specifications/significance): Paired bootstrap resampling for comparing translation methods.
- [Prize Specification](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/specifications/prizes): **$10,000 CAD active prize.** Threshold conditions, claim process, anti-gaming architecture, and future prize pool template.
- [Queue Construction Specification](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/specifications/queue-construction): The formula behind the community-compute queue.
- [Corpus Design Framework](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/specifications/corpus-design): Methodology for building evaluation corpora.
- [Corpus Partnership Strategy](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/specifications/corpus-partnership): Establishing evaluation corpora through academic partnerships.
- [Speaker Validation Protocol](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/specifications/speaker-validation): What bilingual speakers do to validate LYSS metrics.

## Leaderboard

- [MT Evaluation](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/leaderboard/rules): Leaderboard submission criteria, scoring, verification tiers, and anti-gaming policies.
- [Evaluation Datasets](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/leaderboard/datasets): Available datasets, corpus schema, and how to create new ones.

## Sovereignty

- [Data Sovereignty](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/sovereignty/data-sovereignty): OCAP®, CARE, and Te Mana Raraunga principles for Indigenous language data.
- [The Economic Model](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/sovereignty/economic-model): The research-to-revenue flywheel: Arena→champollion→community.
- [Ownership Transfer](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/sovereignty/ownership-transfer): How proven methods transfer from researchers to community governance.

## Community

- [For Language Communities](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/community/for-language-communities): Guide for language speakers: contribute, and what you get back.
- [Support a Low-Resource Language](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/community/low-resource-languages): Building MT for low-resource and polysynthetic languages.

## Perspectives

- [Translation Is Not Revitalization](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/perspectives/translation-is-not-revitalization): What MT can and cannot do for endangered languages.
- [How Speakers Get Paid](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/perspectives/how-speakers-get-paid): Speaker compensation rates, rationale, and scaling model.
- [From Benchmark to Daily Use](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/perspectives/from-benchmark-to-daily-use): The post-editing path from machine draft to published text.
- [Reporting Errors and Owning Corrections](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/perspectives/reporting-errors-and-owning-corrections): Error reporting, provenance, and community veto power.
- [Why the Queue Is Built This Way](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/perspectives/why-the-queue): Philosophy behind the community-compute queue.

## Other

- [How This Site Is Translated](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/how-this-site-is-translated): Provenance table for every locale's machine translation model.

## Optional

- [Cookbook: Coached LLM Prompting](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/tutorials/coached-llm-prompting): Inject grammar rules and dictionaries into LLM prompts.
- [Cookbook: FST-Gated Pipeline](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/tutorials/fst-gated-pipeline): Morphological validation catches what LLMs miss.
- [Cookbook: Dictionary-Augmented LLM](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/tutorials/dictionary-augmented-llm): Force terminology consistency with bilingual dictionaries.
- [Cookbook: Few-Shot Prompting](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/tutorials/few-shot-prompting): Include example translations as in-context examples.
- [Cookbook: Fine-Tuned Model](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/tutorials/fine-tuned-model): Fine-tune an open model on parallel text.
- [Cookbook: Chained Models](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/tutorials/chained-models): Multi-pass: draft, refine, validate.
- [Cookbook: Rule-Based Hybrid](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/tutorials/rule-based-hybrid): Combine deterministic rules with LLM flexibility.
- [Cookbook: Back-Translation](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/tutorials/back-translation): Generate synthetic parallel data via reverse translation.
- [Cookbook: Evolutionary Approach](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/tutorials/evolutionary-approach): Generate, score, mutate, and evolve translations.
- [Cookbook: Partial Translation](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/tutorials/partial-translation): Human-quality sample + machine scale.
- [Cookbook: Corpus Creation](https://mtevalarena.org/docs/tutorials/corpus-creation): Build a corpus for your language.
